My primary areas of interest are Web Development and Data Analytics. I enjoy designing and developing user friendly websites and web applications that solve real world problems. Web development allows me to combine creativity with technical skills to build impactful digital solutions. I am also interested in data analytics because it helps transform raw data into meaningful insights for better decision making. These fields align with my academic background in Artificial Intelligence and Data Sci 20. Why would you like to join FSSAI for Internship? : I would like to join FSSAI as an intern because it provides an excellent opportunity to contribute to an organization that plays a vital role in ensuring food safety and public health in India. As a student of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, I am eager to apply my analytical, technical, and problem solving skills in a meaningful environment.
